detaileddescription.para: You can refer to the below stated example applications for more details on how to use v_gamma_lut driver.

sect1.title: main.c
sect1.para: Contains an example on how to use the XV_gamma_lut driver directly. This example demonstrates the usage of Gamma LUT IP.

sect1.title: vgamma_lut_example.tcl
sect1.para: Contains a tcl file which automates the process of generating the downloadable bit & elf files from the provided example xsa file.

Example application design source files (contained within "examples" folder) are tightly coupled with the v_gamma_lut example design available in Vivado Catalogue. To run this tcl
Copy the exported example design xsa file in the "examples" directory of the driver
Launch the xsct terminal
cd into the examples directory
source the tcl file xsct%>sourcevgamma_lut_example.tcl
execute the script xsct%>vgamma_lut_example<xsa_file_name.xsa>

Script will perform following operations
Create workspace
Create HW project
Create BSP
Create Application Project
Build BSP and Application Project

After the process is complete required files will be available in bit file -> vgamma_lut_example.sdk/vgamma_lut_example_hw_platform folder elf file -> vgamma_lut_example.sdk/vgamma_lut_example_design/{Debug/Release} folder

When executed on the board the example application will perform following operations
Program Video Clock Generator to 1080p@60Hz
Program Gamma LUT to 1080p@60Hz
Check for Video Lock and report the status (PASS/FAIL)on UART
Repeat Steps 1-3 for 4KP@30Hz and 4KP@60Hz
Serial terminal baud rate should be set to 115200 For details, see vgamma_lut_example.tcl.
